tasks.subject: C27 Task 1: Verdict.RESTART_LOOP_REAP + DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append RESTART_LOOP_REAP to Verdict StrEnum and add to DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY. Pure additive.

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py; Test tests/test_reaper.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** Verdict.RESTART_LOOP_REAP exists with value RESTART_LOOP_REAP; appended after STALL_REAP; in DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY; existing tests still pass.

**Verify:** pixi run -- pytest tests/test_reaper.py -v -k 'TestVerdict or TestDefault' → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py", "tests/test_reaper.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/test_reaper.py -v -k 'TestVerdict or TestDefault'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Verdict.RESTART_LOOP_REAP exists with value RESTART_LOOP_REAP", "appended after STALL_REAP per insertion order", "DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY contains the new Verdict", "existing tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: C27 Task 4: classify() row 3'' wiring + tie-breaker

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py (classify); Test tests/test_reaper.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** classify gains 2 new kwargs; row 3'' returns RESTART_LOOP_REAP when only restart-loop fires; tie-breaker STALL_REAP wins; kill-switch None never fires; no classify regression.

**Verify:** pixi run -- pytest tests/test_reaper.py -v -k 'classify or row3' → PASS

tasks.subject: C27 Task 5: LifecycleConfig restart_loop_* fields + validators
tasks.description:

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/config.py; Test tests/test_config.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** restart_loop_reap_enabled=True, window=180.0, threshold=90.0; negative window rejected; negative threshold rejected; YAML roundtrip preserves all 3.

**Verify:** pixi run -- pytest tests/test_config.py -v -k 'LifecycleConfig and restart_loop' → PASS


tasks.subject: C27 Task 6: interfaces.Lifecycle + Config.lifecycle() wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 2 fields to Lifecycle dataclass; Config.lifecycle() collapses enabled bool to window None.

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py, src/kinoforge/core/config.py; Test tests/test_config.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** Lifecycle gains restart_loop_window_s (None default) + restart_loop_uptime_threshold_s (90.0); Config.lifecycle() collapse: disabled → None, enabled → window value; threshold always passes through.

**Verify:** pixi run -- pytest tests/test_config.py -v -k lifecycle_collapse → PASS

tasks.description:

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_loop.py; Test tests/test_heartbeat_loop.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** 2 new __init__ kwargs (window=None, threshold=90.0); _uptime_counter initialised; _tick_once runs both counters; _build_util_extra persists new field both branches; backward-compat preserved.

**Verify:** pixi run -- pytest tests/test_heartbeat_loop.py -v → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_loop.py", "tests/test_heartbeat_loop.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/test_heartbeat_loop.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["__init__ gains 2 kwargs", "_uptime_counter state initialised", "_tick_once runs both counters", "_build_util_extra persists new field", "backward-compat preserved"]}
```

**Acceptance Criteria:** method renamed; old name removed; STALL_REAP route fires + destroys; RESTART_LOOP_REAP route fires + destroys; tie-breaker STALL wins; kill-switch no-fire; log names Verdict + counters.

tasks.subject: C27 Task 10: Cross-process callsite threading
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread restart_loop_window_s + restart_loop_uptime_threshold_s through every HeartbeatLoop construction site and classify call site. Update _adapters.build_util_endpoint_for kill-switch gate.

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/_adapters.py, src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py (lines 736-738, 1020-1022, 1354-1356, 1683-1693, 1711-1713); Test tests/test_adapters.py, tests/test_cli.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** build_util_endpoint_for gates on BOTH stall_reap_enabled OR restart_loop_reap_enabled false; all 5 HeartbeatLoop sites thread kwargs; all classify sites thread kwargs; rg hit count >= 5.

**Verify:** pixi run -- pytest tests/test_adapters.py tests/test_cli.py -v → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/test_adapters.py", "tests/test_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/test_adapters.py tests/test_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["adapter gate considers both enabled flags", "all 5 HeartbeatLoop sites thread kwargs", "all classify sites thread kwargs", "rg hit count >= 5"]}
```

tasks.subject: C27 Task 12: Phase A1 live smoke — FakeUtilEndpoint uptime=1
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it 'verified inline', or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.
